description_long: This stool features a round, flat seat with a smooth, dark finish, supported by a single central pedestal. The base is reinforced with a circular metal footrest and four outward-curving legs that provide stability. The structure is predominantly metallic, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The seat appears to be made of a dense material, possibly wood or composite, with a slightly beveled edge. The footrest is integrated into the lower frame, forming a ring that connects the legs. There are no visible decorative elements, backrest, or upholstery, emphasizing a utilitarian and minimalist design.
description: A round, dark-finished stool with a central pedestal, circular footrest, and four curved metal legs, showcasing an industrial and minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, central pedestal, and the full circular footrest with four legs symmetrically spaced.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the same features as the front, with subtle changes in the leg and footrest angles.
description_view_2: Side view with the seat, pedestal, and footrest ring visible, highlighting the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the front, with the seat and base structure clearly visible.
